narrative:
Venice Twp township has 1,152 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
